'''Farr Orjul''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Separatist]] [[Terrorist/Legends|terrorist]] and a supplier of explosives ordnance for [[Perrive]]'s terror net on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]. He was apprehended by [[Omega Squad]] during a [[Traffic Interdiction Operations|TIOPS]] [[Mission to the Corellian-Perlemian Intersection|mission]] and was interrogated by the [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorian]] [[Walon Vau]] and [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Etain Tur-Mukan]]. During Tur Mukan's first attempt to extract information from him with a simple [[Mind trick/Legends|mind trick]], he spat in her face, and instead she broke down his will enough for Vau finish the job. After extracting as much information from Orjul as he could, Vau [[Death/Legends|killed]] Orjul and his two terrorist accomplices, [[Gysk]] and [[M'truli]].
